description: Style NoteTake a refined approach to workwear bags with bulchee's Spring '12 line. The line has minimal hardware and are delectably hued (and are crafted from handpicked materials) so you'll want more than just one. Guaranteed to leave you "bag-struck", punctuate your everyday ensemble with this uber cool bag.Product DetailsBlack and brown satchel style bag with two short handles and a buttoned flap Has a zipped main compartment with two pouches, a zipped separator and a zipped pocketOne zipped slot under the flapMaterial and Care LeatheretteWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not expose to detergents, alcohol or petroleumSizeHeight: 24 cmWidth: 39 cmDepth: 12 cm
